dataset: INQUIRE validation subset plus generated local demo data
narrative: Presentation benchmark summary for the local iNat x INQUIRE demo. Use with the runtime batch summaries and readiness evidence as the static fallback path when live search is unavailable.
source_command: uv run inq bench run --dataset bench/datasets/inquire/inquire-val-subset.json --provider qdrant --limit 10 --format both --output ../inat-inquire-demo/recordings/metadata/benchmark/recorded-run-summary.json
source_note: Benchmark workflow and dataset path come from Inquire-vector-search. The checked-in recorded-run-summary.json is still a placeholder, so treat these values as presentation benchmark evidence until a final raw benchmark export is captured.
